raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr teem / kas to
Semmi strahdaja / ka ta Sem-
me tappę apkohta bija Efrus
Keluwa Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr teem Wihna-
Dahrseim bija Simejus tas Ra-
matiteris. Bet pahr teem Wih-
na-Dahrsu Angteem pee ta Wih-
na Mantahm bija Sabdus tas
Siwimiteris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr teem Etjes-
Dahrseem un Mescha Wihges-
Rohkeim / kas Eeleija stahweja
bija Baal Anans tas Gaderite-
ris. Un pahr tahm Etjes Man-
tahm bija Joas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr teem Wehr-
scheem/ kas Saroná barrojahs
bija Sitarus tas Saroniteris.
Bet pahr teem Wehrscheem eeksch
Eeleijahin bija Sawats Adlaja
Dehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ua pahr teem Raineeteem
bija Obils tas Jsinaėliteris. Un
pahr tahm Ehsetu-Mahtehm bi-
ja Jeėdijus tas Meronotiteris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr teem fibkeim
Lohpeem bija Jasus tas Agari-
teris. Schee wiſſi bija Wir-
neeki pahr to Padohmu/ kas tam
Kehnikam Dahwidam peeder-
reja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jonatans Dahwida
Bruhlneeks bija par Padohma-
deweju weens gudrs Wihrs/ un
tas pats bija arridsan Kanzleris.
Un Jefėls Akmona Dehls bija
pee ta Kehnika Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Akitowels bija ta keh-
nina Padohmadewejs / un Usa-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "jus tas Arakiteris bija ta Keh-
nina Draugs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz Akitowetu bija
Jojadus Benaja Dehls un Ab-
jatars. Bet Joabs bija ta Keh-
nina Karra Leels-Kungs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad tapulzeja Dahwids
Swiftus Israėta Leelus-
Kungus/ to Ziltn Wirf-
neekus/ un Abwerstus/ un Kap-
teines/ un wiſſa Padohma un
Kehnina Lohnu Wirfneekus/ un
wiınna Dehlu/ar teem Kambar-
Junkureim un Warreneim / ir
wiſſeem stipreem Wiheem us Je-
rusalemı.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninscb Dahwids
zehlahs stahwu us fawahın Kah-
jahm/ un faztija: Klanfajt man/
manni Brahti un manni Lau-
dis / es biju fawa Prahta ap-
rehmees weenu Duffscha-
nas Namnu ustaifıht preeksch
ta KUNGA Derrius Schkir-
stu / un preeksch to Kahjo Pa-
mesln muhsu Deewa/ un jaw
biju taifıjees to padarriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Deews faztija us man-
ni : Tew ne buhs mannım
Wahrdam weenu Namnu dar-
riht/ jo tu effi Katta-Wihrs/ un
effi dauds Affinn islehjıs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu irr tas KUNGS I-
sraėta Deews mann iswehlejs
uo wiſſa manna Tehwa Nam-
ma/
"
